retrieved_result: Apache Apache is a freely available Web server that is distributed under an \"open source\" license. Version 2.0 runs on most UNIX-based operating systems (such as Linux, Solaris, Digital UNIX, and AIX), on other UNIX/ POSIX-derived systems (such as Rhapsody, BeOS, and BS2000/OSD), on Amiga OS, and on
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Apache web server, not Docker, so it is not relevant to a Docker setup for beginners.
